parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player because he makes contradictory claims about his role. He initially claims to be the Seer by stating he looked at Paul's card (lines 35, 38), then later claims to be the Robber by stating he robbed Paul (lines 70, 72), and finally reverts to claiming he was the Seer (line 121). This inconsistency is a strong indicator of a Werewolf bluffing and failing to maintain a consistent story. While Mitchell's claims are also erratic, Justin's contradictions regarding his role's ability to gain information are more characteristic of a Werewolf's deception.

validation.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player because he makes contradictory claims about his role. He initially claims to be the Seer by stating he looked at Paul's card (lines 35, 38), then later claims to be the Robber by stating he robbed Paul (lines 70, 72), and finally reverts to claiming he was the Seer (line 121). This inconsistency is a strong indicator of a Werewolf bluffing and failing to maintain a consistent story. While Mitchell's claims are also erratic, Justin's contradictions regarding his role's ability to gain information are more characteristic of a Werewolf's deception.
